name: SCC_GetDLLInfo
title: SCC_GetDLLInfo
description: This function returns additional information to the DLL.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: Selects the desired return value (see below).

return:
Selector
Description of return value
0
The file version of the DLL in BCD format, e.g., 0x010203 for V1.2.3
1
The main version of the DLL
2
The subversion of the DLL
3
The build number of the DLL
